race.comment: DENMAN BANDIT (5) had a five-week let-up before returning to form last start over 900m at Wellington, stalking the leader then letting down too well. Getting up in the weights but should roll along and will take some stopping over the extra 100m. SOOBOOCO (1) hasn't won for about 45 weeks but is racing well. Was there to strike but just tired in the dying stages over 1100m at Armidale last time out. Coming back to 1000m is a good move. Should be right there at the business end. REPRISAL (7) resumed in a similar race to this 24 days ago at Tamworth and was impossible to miss, coming from last on the bend to be beaten a head. Will need luck at some stage extracting from the inside running but watch for him late again. CANAMBLE (2) returned to form at Mudgee last time, beaten under a length over 1100m after looking a chance close to home. At her best over this trip so cannot be ignored. Distance specialist LA PELAGO (9) wasn't far away at Orange last start and is in the mix
